title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 87.179 - Funding for increases in benefit provisions from future benefits fund
text:
87.179.  Funding for increases in benefit provisions from future benefits fund. — The funding for increases in benefit provisions of sections 87.170, 87.175, 87.182 and 87.371 shall be funded from the future benefits fund upon approval of an appropriate enabling ordinance.
(L. 1995 H.B. 260, et al. merged with S.B. 404)
